message:
test(B10): fill evidence sink + decoding pipeline invariant gaps (16 tests)

Decoding: feed_batch, is_complete, progress, block_status, auth paths,
multi-block roundtrip, BlockAlreadyDecoded, into_data without params.
Evidence sink: FIFO ordering, expected_loss keys, concurrent access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
